minerEnabled.description: Whether autonomous miners may target this repo. Default: true.

wantedPaths.description: Work areas a miner should prefer. Glob list. Default: [].

blockedPaths.description: Paths a miner must skip. Glob list. Default: [].

preferredLabels.description: Issue labels a miner should favor. Default: [].

blockedLabels.description: Issue labels a miner must skip. Default: [].

maxConcurrentClaims.description: Maximum active claims one miner may hold on this repo. Default: 1.

issueDiscoveryPolicy.description: How strongly opening discovery issues is encouraged. Default: neutral.

feasibilityGate.description: Per-repo tuning for the feasibility gate a miner consults before starting work. Default: { enabled: true, suppressedReasons: [] }.

enabled.description: Whether the feasibility gate is consulted at all before a miner starts work. Default: true.

suppressedReasons.description: buildFeasibilityVerdict avoid/raise reason codes this repo wants ignored. Default: [].

selfPlagiarism.description: Self-plagiarism throttle consulted before open_pr (#2345). Default: { similarityThreshold: 0.85 }.

similarityThreshold.description: Jaccard similarity threshold for near-duplicate diff fingerprints. Default: 0.85.

killSwitch.description: Per-repo kill-switch consulted by the Governor chokepoint before every write action (#2341). Default: { paused: false }.

paused.description: Halts all miner WRITE actions for this repo without deregistering it from targeting/discovery. Default: false.
